programme.title: Colombiana
programme.desc: A young girl in Bogota witnesses her parents' murder and grows up to be a stone-cold assassin.

programme.title: Glastonbury 2024
programme.desc: Chris Martin's band make musical history by headlining at the Pyramid Stage a record-breaking five times. Grammy award-winning singer Dua Lipa also graces the Pyramid Stage – seven years after her festival debut – while country-pop crossover singer Shania Twain follows in the footsteps of Diana Ross, Dolly Parton and Kylie Minogue by taking the coveted Sunday afternoon legend' slot.

programme.title: The Chase S16
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Arts 21
programme.desc: ARTS 21 is an arts magazine show focusing on the latest news and events on the culture scene.

programme.title: Mark Moriarty: Off Duty Chef - Series 3
programme.desc: From how to cook fish perfectly to balancing flavours and reimagining leftovers to save money and reduce waste, the new series will see Mark share a whole new set of recipes.

programme.desc: Ollie and Cherry disagree on the telling of Red Riding Hood. When Yellow Square loses a tooth, he gets a gold coin from the tooth fairy. Learning about this, the Imp is determined to catch the tooth fairy for himself.

programme.desc: For Bingo, she loves horsing around with her Dad, but sometimes he forgets that Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep their fun within her limits.

programme.title: Bluey: Sr1
programme.desc: At school, Bluey and her friends all throw themselves into various games. Their teacher Calypso keeps her charges on track with a wise word and a song - all except for the mysterious Pretzel.

programme.title: Bluey: Sr1
programme.desc: Honey is stuck waiting for Dr Bingo's appointment as all the other, more exciting injuries get seen before her's. Receptionist Bluey tells her to be patient, as some of these cases are a real pickle.

programme.desc: Captain Redbeard's treasure has gone missing so Number Squad have come in to help find it! Farmer Haywire keeps counting her ducklings over and over again but he can't figure out why! Can the Number Squad help him find out why?

programme.title: Pokemon Horizons: The Series
programme.desc: The series stars two new protagonists, Liko and Roy, who team up with the Rising Volt Tacklers, a group of adventurers that explore the Pokmon world and visit various regions. As they do, they are pursued by the Explorers, a mysterious organization seeking Liko's pendant for unknown reasons.

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal
programme.desc: MY BEST FRIEND'S AN ANIMAL is an emotive, heart-warming series which tells the stories of humans who have unlikely and extraordinary friendships with wild animals. Featuring 6 compelling stories per episode and filmed all over the world. The series proves that when it comes to friendship, shape, size, or even species is irrelevant. Respect, trust, and understanding can be found in the most surprising places.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: A stuffy businessman finds himself trapped inside the body of his family's cat.

programme.title: Rita Ora at the Eiffel Tower
programme.desc: Global superstar Rita Ora performs in an exclusive night of live-music, dance and iconic-fashion, all set under the cinematic backdrop of the Eiffel Tower. A kaleidoscope of the past, present and future, Rita performs global hits like Anywhere, Lonely Together alongside tracks from her EP Bang.

programme.title: Magic Camp

programme.title: The Wonder Shop

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 轻巧省空间开箱即用安静运行减震护膝可调速度与坡度适合快走与慢跑折叠后薄至12公分轻松收纳床底或靠墙摆放让居家运动更轻松自在.

programme.title: 上山下海过一夜

programme.title: 消失的国界

programme.title: Tiga Hari Ke Korban
programme.desc: Four bickering orphaned siblings, an abandoned grandmother and a goat let loose in the village three days before Hari Raya Haji may be the answer to unravel the true meaning of sacrifice and family ties.

programme.title: Mencari Hajar
programme.desc: While Sarah's mother welcomes Ibrahim, Sarah's marriage to Ibrahim reminds her father, Kenny, of his aunt who was given away shortly after birth to a Malay family. Kenny had promised his latefather who've dedicated his life looking for his long-lost sister, to find her no matter what. Hui Jun, (Sarah), who is heavily pregnant, lives with her parents-in-law. She makes acquaintances with her neighbour Hajar and and their fondness towards each other grows.

programme.title: Bisikan Syahdu
programme.desc: Nadia, a Singaporean expatriate living in luxury in Jeddah with her successful husband, faces an awakening following her parents' visit in Saudi and her father Aziz's sudden death. Distanced from her simple roots, Nadia is presented to the idea of performing the Hajj pilgrimage in his place, while she has other priorities instead - her lavish lifestyle.

programme.title: Marhaban Ustaz!
programme.desc: Two cousins, Farah and Ratna, in their 20s, meet with an Ustaz from their past whom they had their teenage crush on, when he now returns, years later, as their Arabic language teacher. As they learn the Arabic language, they also learn to re-examine their life values. The Ustaz will also ultimately teach them and others a few things about life as Muslims here prepare for the 2021 Haj season.

programme.title: Juara Memasak Senior Vs Junior
programme.desc: Juara Memasak returns with a new spin, pitting youths against their senior counterparts. Can the seniors defeat the youths with their vast experience and knowledge, or will the youths edge the seniors out with their creativity and new innovations? The kitchen is set for the most exciting cook-off battle yet. Watch as they fight to win 25,000 and be crowned as the champion.

programme.title: Upin & Ipin S11
programme.desc: (Dual language Malay and English) The 11th season of Upin & Ipin' will feature new activities like exploring around the village, getting into the imagination world with the dinosaurs and robots, exploring the sea and many more!

programme.title: Home Ideas
programme.desc: This program is perfect for those of you who are and want to build a house, especially one that has a minimalist size. programme.title: Calon Isteri Buat Suami
programme.desc: After another accident involving Haizi's father, she and Nazim visit him in the hospital. There, Nazim learns from Dayana that Khalif was Haizi's former fiancé.

programme.title: Saat Aku Tahu (The Moment I Knew It)
programme.desc: Ameena and Zarif drift apart as he begins to fall for Maira. Despite Datuk Zaidi's proof, Ameena remains in denial until signs of the affair become undeniable.

programme.title: Kapal Haji
programme.desc: Ustazah Aishah is offered a chance to travel on Kapal Haji (steamship to Hajj) is faced with a dilemma when the villagers question her ability to lead the pilgrims. Inspector Jumaat's efforts to stop a scam of the villager's pilgrimage savings put him in a difficult position, leading to series of challenges.

programme.title: Setulus Hati
programme.desc: Setulus Hati tells the story of a pilot and flight attendant, Alvino and Rossa. Their marriage looks perfect and harmonious. But apparently, the presence of Lia, who is Rossa's best friend, actually becomes a thorn in Rossa and Alvino's marriage.

programme.title: Arya
programme.desc: Arya and Mithra's heated argument in the car spirals out of control, leading to a devastating accident. These 10-week competition will see amateur homecooks from all walks of life displaying their culinary talents, with a group of illustrious mentor and mentee chefs standing in their way, as these homecooks strive to emerge to be the King of Culinary. Winner stands a chance to win cash prize.

programme.title: Veera Pathakam
programme.desc: A policeman uses corrupt means to reach the highest position in the police hierarchy. He changes after he meets a relative whose life he had destroyed because of his irresponsible behaviour.

programme.title: Samaippoma S2
programme.desc: Samaippoma [Cookery Show] two dishes are presented in an entertaining way every episode, with lots of new varieties.

programme.title: Pasanga Season 1
programme.desc: A Tamil drama series that highlights the importance of friendship, family and love. This heartwarming story follows the lives of four individuals from different backgrounds and walks of life.

programme.title: Seithi
programme.desc: (Live) Tamil Seithi focuses primarily on local and international news, information and current affairs. Catch the online news portal at http://seithi.mediacorp.sg/.

programme.title: Kannae Kaniamuthe S3
programme.desc: Lives have changed—some for better, others for worse. As old wounds heal, new faces arrive, bringing unexpected challenges and shifting loyalties. Will they lead our protagonists toward growth or darker paths? As choices and consequences collide, this season explores identity, forgiveness, and change through gripping drama and unpredictable twists.

programme.title: Koranjeh Velai Niranjeh Ooru Season 2
programme.desc: Join Rabbit Mac as he travels around 13 different locations in Malaysia while indulging in delicious local delicacies, a variety of fun adventures and attractive tourist spots. Strapped with a minimum budget, for lodging, food, activities and souvenirs, it's a travel show like no other!

programme.title: Must Date the Playboy!
programme.desc: In the captivating drama "Must Date the Playboy," we follow the journey of Victoria, a loyal friend determined to shield her best friend, Chloe, from further heartbreak. When Victoria discovers that Zach, the notorious playboy of their high school, is behind Chloe's string of failed relationships, she devises a bold plan: propose to Zach herself to keep him occupied and away from Chloe's heart.

programme.title: Azhagiya Tamil Magal S3
programme.desc: A newspaper unit undergoes upheaval when it transits from print to digital. This change parallels the journey of the staff who find themselves at the crossroads, grappling with the challenges that life throws at them.

programme.title: Mellisai Hits S3
programme.desc: Collection of hit melody songs from 1990s - 2000s.
